summary: Comprehensive feature toggle + nav item + VideoMeetingsPage testing. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). All 8 feature-gated nav items verified working correctly with their toggles. VideoMeetingsPage loads and Create Meeting dialog works. Feature saves persist to DB and are re-read on page load. One minor UI counting bug found in FeaturesManager.

ui_bugs.issue: Enabled count in header ('2/28 enabled') and category counts ('0/4 enabled') only count DB-stored features, ignoring default-enabled features. Toggles correctly display defaults (Patient Portal, User Registration, Doctor Portal show as Enabled with blue toggle) but the counter says '0/4 enabled' for the category. Misleading UX.

issues: NavItem data-testid generation uses .replace(' ', '-') which only replaces the FIRST space. Multi-word labels like 'Stay Up To Date' would generate 'nav-stay-up to date' (broken testid). Only affects non-feature-gated items so doesn't break current feature.

action_items: MINOR: Fix FeaturesManager enabled count to use `isEnabled` logic (features[f.id] ?? f.defaultEnabled) instead of just features[f.id] so that default-enabled features are counted correctly
MINOR: Fix NavItem data-testid generation to replace ALL spaces: use .replace(/\s+/g, '-') instead of .replace(' ', '-')
critical_code_review_comments: FeaturesManager.js line 443: enabledCount = Object.values(features).filter(v => v).length — only counts DB-stored features, not defaults. Should use FEATURE_DEFINITIONS to compute accurate count: FEATURE_DEFINITIONS.filter(f => features[f.id] ?? f.defaultEnabled).length
FeaturesManager.js line 537: category enabled count same bug — categoryFeatures.filter(f => features[f.id]).length should be categoryFeatures.filter(f => features[f.id] ?? f.defaultEnabled).length
Layout.js line 277: data-testid uses .replace(' ', '-') — only replaces first space. Should use .replace(/\s+/g, '-') for multi-word labels like 'Stay Up To Date'
POST /api/video-rooms/meetings has no authentication requirement — publicly accessible meeting creation (noted in previous iteration, still present)
seed_data_creation: 1 TEST_ meeting created during backend testing: TEST_Feature Toggle Test Meeting
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature toggle integration fully tested and working. All 8 feature-gated nav items verified: Analytics (analytics_dashboard), Patients (patient_portal), Telehealth/video-meetings (video_conferencing), Campaigns (marketing_campaigns), Lead Intake (lead_intake_hub), Insurance Verify (officeally_integration), Doctors (doctors_directory), Fax Center (fax_center). VideoMeetingsPage at /video-meetings has data-testid=video-meetings-page, create-meeting-btn opens create-meeting-dialog, meeting-title-input and create-meeting-submit-btn all working. Feature toggle test data-testids: toggle-{feature_id} (e.g. toggle-video_conferencing). DB state at time of testing: video_conferencing=True, fax_center=False, analytics_dashboard=True (explicitly set), others at defaults.
verified_features: ✅ Analytics nav item visible when analytics_dashboard enabled (default: true)
✅ Analytics nav item NOT visible when analytics_dashboard disabled (admin-only flag works too)
✅ Telehealth nav item visible when video_conferencing=True
✅ Telehealth nav item GONE when video_conferencing=False (toggle tested live)
✅ Campaigns nav item appears when marketing_campaigns enabled
✅ Lead Intake nav item appears when lead_intake_hub enabled
✅ Insurance Verify appears when officeally_integration enabled
✅ Doctors nav item appears when doctors_directory enabled
✅ Fax Center visible to super_admin when fax_center enabled
✅ Create Meeting dialog has title input + submit button
✅ POST /api/features saves feature state to DB and persists on reload
✅ GET /api/features/all is public, returns features dict
